spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The aarakocra casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The aarakocra doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The aarakocra makes two Lancing Wind attacks. Lancing Wind. Melee or Ranged {@variantrule Attack Roll|XPHB}: {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) Force damage plus (7) {@damage 2d6} Thunder damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

legendary.name: Gale
entries: The aarakocra makes a Lancing Wind attack.

legendary.name: Tempest Magic
entries: The aarakocra uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Call Lightning|XPHB}, {@spell Conjure Elemental|XPHB} (Air), {@spell Freedom of Movement|XPHB}, {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB}, or {@spell Ice Storm|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Wings of Syranita
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 15}, each Large or smaller creature within 10 feet of the aarakocra. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Thunder damage, and the target is pushed up to 10 feet straight away from the aarakocra and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The aarakocra can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The aboleth casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 21}):

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Aura of Tyranny
entries: The aboleth emanates an aura in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} while it doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. {@actSave wis} {@dc 20}, any enemy that starts its turn in the aura. {@actSaveFail} the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of the aboleth's next turn. If the target is already {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, it instead takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this aboleth's Aura of Tyranny for 24 hours.

trait.name: Eldritch Restoration
entries: If destroyed, the aboleth gains a new body in {@dice 5d10} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in the Far Realm or another location chosen by the DM.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the aboleth fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Mucus Cloud
entries: While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by mucus. {@actSave con} {@dc 19}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the aboleth at the end of the aboleth's turn. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target's skin becomes slimy, the target can breathe air and water, and it can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} unless it is underwater.

While the cursed creature is outside a body of water, the creature takes 6 ({@damage 1d12}) Acid damage at the end of every 10 minutes unless moisture is applied to its skin before those minutes have passed.

trait.name: Probing Telepathy
entries: If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The aboleth makes four Tentacle attacks and uses either Consume Memories, Dominate Mind, or Spellcasting if available. It can replace one Tentacle attack with the use of Fling.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 15 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d6 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) from one of four tentacles.

action.name: Fling
entries: The aboleth throws a Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it to a space it can see within 30 feet of itself that isn't in the air. {@actSave dex} {@dc 22}, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Consume Memories
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 21}, one creature within 30 feet that is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the aboleth. {@actSaveFail} 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The aboleth gains the target's memories if the target is a Humanoid and is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by this action.

action.name: Dominate Mind (3/Day)
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 21}, one creature the aboleth can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the aboleth dies or is on a different plane of existence from the target. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target acts as an ally to the aboleth and is under its control while within 60 feet of it. In addition, the aboleth and the target can communicate telepathically with each other over any distance.
The target repeats the save whenever it takes damage as well as after every 24 hours it spends at least 1 mile away from the aboleth, ending the effect on itself on a success.

legendary.name: Lash
entries: The aboleth makes one Tentacle attack.

legendary.name: Oppress
entries: The aboleth casts {@spell Command|XPHB} (level 3 version) or {@spell Phantasmal Force|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The aboleth can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Psychic Drain
entries: If the aboleth has at least one creature {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, it uses Consume Memories and regains 11 ({@dice 2d10}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Eldritch Restoration
entries: If destroyed, the aboleth gains a new body in {@dice 5d10} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in the Far Realm or another location chosen by the DM.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the aboleth fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Mucus Cloud
entries: While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by mucus. {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the aboleth at the end of the aboleth's turn. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target's skin becomes slimy, the target can breathe air and water, and it can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} unless it is underwater.

While the cursed creature is outside a body of water, the creature takes 6 ({@damage 1d12}) Acid damage at the end of every 10 minutes unless moisture is applied to its skin before those minutes have passed.

trait.name: Probing Telepathy
entries: If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The aboleth makes two Tentacle attacks or two Slime Orb attacks and uses either Consume Memories or Dominate Mind if available.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 15 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) from one of four tentacles.

action.name: Slime Orb
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage, and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the end of the aboleth's next turn.

action.name: Consume Memories
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 18}, one creature within 30 feet that is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the aboleth. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The aboleth gains the target's memories if the target is a Humanoid and is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by this action.

action.name: Dominate Mind (2/Day)
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}, one creature the aboleth can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the aboleth dies or is on a different plane of existence from the target. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target acts as an ally to the aboleth and is under its control while within 60 feet of it. In addition, the aboleth and the target can communicate telepathically with each other over any distance.
The target repeats the save whenever it takes damage as well as after every 24 hours it spends at least 1 mile away from the aboleth, ending the effect on itself on a success.

legendary.name: Lash
entries: The aboleth makes one Tentacle attack.

legendary.name: Psychic Drain
entries: If the aboleth has at least one creature {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, it uses Consume Memories and regains 5 ({@dice 1d10}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Slime
entries: The aboleth makes one Slime Orb attack.

legendary.name: Slime Sphere
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the aboleth can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage, and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the end of the aboleth's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The aboleth can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The shaytan casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 25}):

spellcasting.name: Unholy Magic
headerEntries: The shaytan casts {@spell Bestow Curse|XPHB}, {@spell Ray of Enfeeblement|XPHB}, or {@spell Ray of Sickness|XPHB} using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the shaytan dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the shaytan fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The shaytan has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The shaytan makes two Flying Sword attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Slaying Bow.

action.name: Flying Sword
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 15}, reach 10 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d6 + 8}) Slashing damage plus 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Necrotic damage. {@hom}The sword magically returns to the shaytan's hand or hovers within 5 feet of the shaytan immediately after a ranged attack.

action.name: Slaying Bow
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 21}, one creature the shaytan can see within 600 feet. {@actSaveFail} If the creature has 100 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer, it dies. It otherwise takes 24 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) Piercing damage plus 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the shaytan takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

legendary.name: Abyssal Teleport
entries: The shaytan teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. {@actSave dex} {@dc 25}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the shaytan at its destination space. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

legendary.name: Terrifying Gaze
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 25}, one creature the shaytan can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The shaytan can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The aarakocra doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The aarakocra makes two attacks, using Talons and Storm Spear in any combination.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Slashing damage, or 10 ({@damage 3d4 + 3}) Slashing damage if the aarakocra moved 30+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit.

action.name: Storm Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Lightning damage and 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Thunder damage. {@hom}The spear magically returns to the aarakocra's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 150/600 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Thunder damage.

bonus.name: Disengage
entries: The aarakocra takes the {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.

action.name: Multiattack

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8} (with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} if the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the ankheg brood queen), reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}).

entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 60-foot-long, 10-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Ground-Shaking Movement {@recharge 5}
entries: The ankheg burrows up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}. At the end of this movement, the ankheg creates an instantaneous shock wave in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from itself. Creatures in that area are subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} A creature loses {@status Concentration|XPHB} and, if Large or smaller, have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

legendary.name: Command Brood
entries: One ally that can see or hear the ankheg brood queen can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make one melee attack.

legendary.name: Lay Broodling Eggs
entries: The ankheg brood queen lays {@dice 1d6} broodling eggs. Each egg appears in an unoccupied space of the ankheg brood queen's choice within 10 feet of it. Each broodling egg has an AC of 5 and 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. A broodling egg hatches before the start of the brood queen's next turn. When a broodling egg hatches, an ankheg broodling appears within 5 feet of the hatched egg. In combat, the ankheg broodling shares the ankheg brood queen's {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but it takes its turn immediately after the ankheg brood queen. The ankheg broodling is an ally to the ankheg brood queen and its allies. The ankheg brood queen can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Skittering Strike
entries: The ankheg brood queen can move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Foreleg attack.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The ankheg can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 20-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Bite

If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}).

reaction.name: Protection
entries: {@actTrigger} An attacker the ankheg can see makes an attack roll against an ally within 5 feet of the ankheg. {@actResponse} The ankheg imposes {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll.

trait.name: Illumination

entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, one creature the azer can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Fire damage, and the target starts {@hazard burning|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Fire Aura
entries: At the end of each of the azer's turns, each creature of the azer's choice in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the azer takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Fire damage unless the azer has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The azer sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 10 feet.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the azer's choice (excluding itself) in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The azer makes two attacks, using {@hazard Burning|XPHB} Flail or Hurl Flame in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Scouring Command.

action.name: Burning Flail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Hurl Flame
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 60 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d8 + 2}) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts {@hazard burning|XPHB}.

action.name: Scouring Command
entries: One ally who can see or hear the azer takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage. It can then take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, adding 9 ({@dice 2d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

trait.name: Fire Aura
entries: At the end of each of the azer's turns, each creature of the azer's choice in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the azer takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Fire damage unless the azer has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The azer sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 10 feet.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The azer makes two attacks, using {@hazard Burning|XPHB} Axe or Throwing Hammer in any combination.

action.name: Burning Axe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Throwing Hammer
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

bonus.name: Kossuth's Blessing (1/Day)
entries: Up to ten allies that can see or hear the azer deal an extra 5 ({@damage 1d10}) fire damage with their attacks until the end of the azer's next turn.

bonus.name: Kossuth's Wrath
entries: Immediately after the azer deals fire damage to a target. {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the azer's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to Kossuth's Wrath for 24 hours.

trait.name: Detect Life
entries: The banshee magically senses the direction of creatures up to 1 mile away that aren't Constructs or Undead.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The banshee can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day, or 3/Day in Lair)
entries: If the banshee fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The banshee makes two Corrupting Touch attacks and uses Horrify.

action.name: Corrupting Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Horrify
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, one creature the banshee can see within 60 feet that can see the banshee. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of the banshee's next turn. While {@condition Frightened|XPHB} in this way, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this banshee's Horrify for 24 hours.

action.name: Deathly Wail {@recharge}
entries: The banshee releases a mournful wail if it isn't in sunlight. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature within 30 feet that can hear the wail and isn't a Construct or an Undead. {@actSaveFail} If the target has 50 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer, it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. Otherwise, the target takes 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Psychic damage.

legendary.name: Corrupt
entries: The banshee flies up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Corrupting Touch attack.

legendary.name: Haunt
entries: The banshee uses Horrify.

legendary.name: Kiss of Death
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The banshee casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (2/Day)
headerEntries: The banshee casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (2/Day)
headerEntries: The banshee casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} or {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

entries: The banshee magically senses the direction of creatures up to 1 mile away that aren't Constructs or Undead.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The banshee can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

Otherwise, the target takes 24 ({@damage 7d6}) Psychic damage.

legendary.name: Arcane Magic
entries: The banshee casts {@spell Charm Person|XPHB}, {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Hold Person|XPHB}, {@spell Invisibility|XPHB}, or {@spell Web|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

entries: The banshee flies up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Corrupting Burst attack.

legendary.name: Haunt
entries: The banshee uses Horrify.

entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The basilisk makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks. It can replace the Bite attack with a use of Poison Breath.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Poison Breath
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the basilisk's next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Constitution saving throws.

bonus.name: Petrifying Gaze {@recharge 4}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. If the basilisk sees its reflection within the {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}, the basilisk must make this save. {@actSaveFail 1} The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveFail 2} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition instead of the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the behir fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The behir makes one Bite attack and uses Constrict.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 15 ft. {@h}27 ({@damage 3d12 + 8}) Piercing damage plus 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 22}, one Large or smaller creature the behir can see within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 39 ({@damage 7d8 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 1d6 + 8}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 10 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Lightning Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 19}, each creature in a 120-foot-long, 10-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 82 ({@damage 15d10}) Lightning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 22}, one Huge or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the behir (the behir can have only one creature swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The behir swallows the target, which is no longer {@condition Grappled|XPHB}. While swallowed, a creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the behir, and takes 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the behir's turns.

If the behir takes 45 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the behir must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls in a space within 15 feet of the behir and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the behir dies, a swallowed creature is no longer {@condition Restrained|XPHB} and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Claw Rake
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 22}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the behir. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d6 + 8}) Slashing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

legendary.name: Onslaught
entries: The behir moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Claw attack.

legendary.name: Tail Swipe
entries: The behir makes one Tail attack.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The behir makes one Bite attack and uses Constrict.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d12 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 15}, one Medium or smaller creature the behir can see within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Lightning Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 30-foot-long, 5-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 49 ({@damage 9d10}) Lightning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The beholder casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the beholder fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The beholder uses Eye Rays three times.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Eye Rays
entries: The beholder randomly shoots one of the following magical rays at a target it can see within 120 feet of itself (roll {@dice 1d10}; reroll if the beholder has already used that ray during this turn):

items.name: 1: Charm Ray
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 1 hour or until it takes damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

items.name: 2: Paralyzing Ray
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

items.name: 3: Fear Ray
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

items.name: 4: Slowing Ray
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 5d8}) Necrotic damage. Until the end of the target's next turn, the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved; the target can't take Reactions; and it can take either an action or a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on its turn, not both. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

items.name: 5: Enervation Ray
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

items.name: 6: Telekinetic Ray
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 18} (the target succeeds automatically if it is Gargantuan). {@actSaveFail} The beholder moves the target up to 30 feet in any direction.

The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the start of the beholder's next turn or until the beholder has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. The beholder can also exert fine control on objects with this ray, such as manipulating a tool or opening a door or container.

items.name: 7: Sleep Ray
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 18} (the target succeeds automatically if it is a Construct or an Undead). {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. The condition ends if the target takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

items.name: 8: Petrification Ray
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail 1} The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveFail 2} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition instead of the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition.

items.name: 9: Disintegration Ray
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} 45 ({@damage 10d8}) Force damage. If the target is a nonmagical object or a creation of magical force, a 10- foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} of it disintegrates into dust. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If the target is a creature and this damage reduces it to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it disintegrates into dust.

items.name: 10: Death Ray
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} 66 ({@damage 12d10}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The target dies if the ray reduces it to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Antimagic Cone
entries: The beholder's central eye emits an antimagic wave in a 150-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. Until the start of the beholder's next turn or until the beholder redirects it, that area acts as an {@spell Antimagic Field|XPHB} spell, and that area works against the beholder's own Eye Rays.

reaction.name: Redirect Antimagic Cone
entries: {@actTrigger} When the beholder sees a creature within 150 feet of it take a Magic action. {@actResponse} The beholder turns its central eye toward the creature and uses Antimagic Cone.

A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, it has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the bulette, and it takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the bulette's turns.

If the bulette takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the bulette must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the bulette and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the bulette dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

Creatures in that area are subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} A creature loses {@status Concentration|XPHB} and, if Large or smaller, have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.
