legendary.name: Roar
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 19}, each enemy in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the chimera. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition for 1 minute and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this chimera's Roar for 24 hours. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The chimera can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Wing Attack
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 19}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the chimera. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is pushed up to 10 feet straight away from the chimera and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The chimera flies up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The ankhimera can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ankhimera makes one Ram attack, one Bite attack, and one Claw attack. It can replace the Claw attack with a use of Acid Spray or Cold Breath, whichever is available.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage, or 17 ({@damage 4d6 + 3}) Piercing damage if the ankhimera had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d12 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Acid Spray {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 30-foot-long, 5-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Cold Breath {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Cold damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The gorgimera makes one Gore attack, one Bite attack, and one Claw attack. It can replace the Claw attack with a use of Lightning Breath or Petrification Breath, whichever is available.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Piercing damage, or 19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Piercing damage if the gorgimera had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the gorgon moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Lightning Breath {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 60-foot-long, 5-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 44 ({@damage 8d10}) Lightning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Petrifying Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail 1} The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveFail 2} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition instead of the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Trample
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}, one creature within 5 feet that has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mantimera makes one Ram attack, one Bite attack, and one Claw attack, or it can make three Tail Spike attacks. It can replace the Claw or one Tail Spike attack with a use of Acid Breath, if available.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Piercing damage, or 18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) Piercing damage if the mantimera had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d12 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Tail Spike
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 100/200 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Acid Breath {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 30-foot-long, 5-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 42 ({@damage 12d6}) Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

monster.name: Chuul Juggernaut
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The chuul can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Sense Magic
entries: The chuul senses magic within 120 feet of itself. This trait otherwise works like the {@spell Detect Magic|XPHB} spell but isn't itself magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The chuul makes two Pincer attacks and uses Paralyzing Tentacles or Telekinetic Pull.

action.name: Pincer
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}) from one of two pincers.

action.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the chuul. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Telekinetic Pull
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 13}, one Huge or smaller creature within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is pulled 30 toward the chuul and has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}) until the start of the chuul's next turn. Until the grapple ends, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, and it takes 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Psychic damage at the start of each of its turns.

monster.name: Uchuulun (Slime Chuul)
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The uchuulun can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Corrosive Slime
entries: A creature that hits the uchuulun with a melee attack roll takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Acid damage.

trait.name: Sense Magic
entries: The uchuulun senses magic within 120 feet of itself.
This trait otherwise works like the {@spell Detect Magic|XPHB} spell but isn't itself magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The uchuulun makes two Pincer attacks and uses Paralyzing Tentacles. It can replace the Paralyzing Tentacles with the use of Mind Blast, if available.

action.name: Pincer
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Acid damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) from one of two pincers.

action.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the uchuulun. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition and takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Acid damage at the start of each of its turns.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The cloaker casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

spellcasting.name: Phantasms (Recharge after a Short or Long Rest)
headerEntries: The cloaker casts the {@spell Mirror Image|XPHB} spell, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability. The spell ends early if the cloaker starts or ends its turn in {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the cloaker fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Light Sensitivity
entries: While in {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}, the cloaker has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the cloaker's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cloaker makes one Attach attack and two Tail attacks.

action.name: Attach
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, the cloaker attaches to it. While the cloaker is attached, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition, and the cloaker can't make Attach attacks against other targets. In addition, the cloaker halves the damage it takes (round down), and the target takes the same amount of damage.
The cloaker can detach itself by spending 5 feet of movement.
The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can take an action to try to detach the cloaker, doing so by succeeding on a {@dc 15} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Moan
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 90-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the cloaker. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the cloaker's next turn. While {@condition Frightened|XPHB} in this way, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this cloaker's Moan for the next 24 hours.

bonus.name: Shadow Jump {@recharge 5}
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the cloaker teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see that is in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Psionic Magic
entries: The cloaker uses Spellcasting. The cloaker can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Swooping Lash
entries: The cloaker flies up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Tail attack.

legendary.name: Tyrant's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the cloaker can then take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make one attack. If the attack hits, it deals an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) damage. If the attack misses, the ally takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) psychic damage.

spellcasting.name: Phantasms {@recharge}
headerEntries: The cloaker casts the {@spell Mirror Image|XPHB} spell, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability. The spell ends early if the cloaker starts or ends its turn in {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}.

trait.name: Light Sensitivity
entries: While in {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}, the cloaker has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cloaker makes one Attach attack and two Tail attacks.

action.name: Attach
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the cloaker regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount.

If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the cloaker attaches to it. While the cloaker is attached, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition, and the cloaker can't make Attach attacks against other targets. In addition, the cloaker halves the damage it takes (round down), and the target takes the same amount of damage.
The cloaker can detach itself by spending 5 feet of movement.
The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can take an action to try to detach the cloaker, doing so by succeeding on a {@dc 15} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic {@variantrule Damage|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Moan
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the cloaker. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the cloaker's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this cloaker's Moan for the next 24 hours.

bonus.name: Shadow Step
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the cloaker teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see that is in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the cloaker takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cockatrice makes one Petrifying Bite attack, one Talons attack, and one Sting attack.

action.name: Petrifying Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail 1} The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The target repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveFail 2} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition, instead of the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, for 24 hours.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Sting
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage.

action.name: Death Crow (1/Day)
entries: The cockatrice releases a horrid crow. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, each creature within 30 feet that can hear the crow and isn't a Construct or an Undead. {@actSaveFail} If the target has 20 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer, it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. Otherwise, the target takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The couatl casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):
will: {@spell Shapechange|XPHB} (Beast or Humanoid form only, no {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} gained from the spell, and no Concentration or {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} required to maintain the spell)

spellcasting.name: Divine Aid (4/Day)
headerEntries: The couatl casts {@spell Bless|XPHB}, {@spell Lesser Restoration|XPHB}, {@spell Mass Healing Word|XPHB}, {@spell Revivify|XPHB}, or {@spell Sanctuary|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the couatl fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Shielded Mind
entries: The couatl's thoughts can't be read by any means, and other creatures can communicate with it telepathically only if it allows them.

trait.name: Unbound Grace
entries: The couatl automatically succeeds on saving throws against having the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, provided the couatl doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The couatl makes one Bite attack and uses Constrict.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Force damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Radiant damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the couatl's next turn. While it has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 18}, one Large or smaller creature the couatl can see within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Force damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Radiant damage. The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Pillar of Dawn {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} originating from a point the couatl can see within 300 feet. {@actSaveFail} 54 ({@damage 12d8}) Radiant damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Ethereal Jaunt
entries: The couatl teleports from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane or vice versa.

legendary.name: Divine Magic
entries: The couatl uses Spellcasting. The couatl can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Graceful Strike
entries: The couatl flies up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking an Opportunity Attack, and it makes one Bite attack or uses Constrict.

trait.name: Stench
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 10}, any creature that starts its turn in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the claw. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this claw's Stench for 24 hours.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}2 Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature that isn't an Undead or elf, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 10}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Stench
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, any creature that starts its turn in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the swarm. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this swarm's Stench for 24 hours.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Swarm of Ghastly Hands
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}25 ({@damage 5d8 + 3}) Necrotic damage, or 16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Necrotic damage if the swarm is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}. If the target is a creature that isn't an Undead or elf, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Bloodied Frenzy
entries: While {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, the cyclops has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cyclops makes two attacks, using Greataxe or Rock in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Cleaving Swing, if available.

action.name: Greataxe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 3d12 + 7}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 3d10 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Cleaving Swing {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} originating from the cyclops. {@actSaveFail} 26 ({@damage 3d12 + 7}) Slashing damage, and if the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The cyclops casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: Heart of the Storm
entries: When the cyclops casts {@spell Cacophonic Shield|FRHoF}, {@spell Lightning Bolt|XPHB}, {@spell Shatter|XPHB}, or {@spell Thunderwave|XPHB}, all other creatures within 10 feet of the cyclops each take 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cyclops makes two attacks, using Storm Staff or Storm Lash in any combination.

action.name: Storm Staff
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Thunder damage.

action.name: Storm Lash
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, range 90 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d10}) Lightning damage and 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Thunder damage.

action.name: Storm Fall {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} originating from a point the cyclops can see within 500 feet. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Lightning damage and 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Thunder damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Quickened Spell (3/Day)
entries: The cyclops uses Spellcasting.

reaction.name: Limited Foresight {@recharge}
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the cyclops can see makes an attack roll against it. {@actResponse} The cyclops imposes {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the roll, and the cyclops gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against the target until the end of the cyclops's next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The cyclops casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cyclops makes two Mind Staff attacks and uses Bewildering Word.

action.name: Mind Staff
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Bewildering Word
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, one creature within 60 feet the cyclops can see. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls until the end of the cyclop's next turn.

reaction.name: Limited Foresight {@recharge}
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the cyclops can see makes an attack roll against it. {@actResponse} The cyclops imposes {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the roll, and the cyclops gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against the target until the end of the cyclops's next turn.

reaction.name: Misty Retreat (2/Day)
entries: {@actTrigger} The cyclops takes damage. {@actResponse} The cyclops casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The cyclopskin makes two attacks, using Greatclub or Javelin in any combination.

action.name: Greatclub
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Javelin
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Piercing damage.

reaction.name: Limited Foresight {@recharge}
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the cyclops can see makes an attack roll against it. {@actResponse} The cyclops imposes {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the roll, and the cyclops gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against the target until the end of the cyclops's next turn.

monster.name: Mindmantle
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak; telepathy 30 ft.

action.name: Crush
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage, and the mindmantle attaches to the target. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the mindmantle had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll, it covers the target, which has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition and is suffocating while the mindmantle is attached in this way.

While attached to a target, the mindmantle can attack only the target but has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on its attack rolls. Its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} becomes 0, it can't benefit from any bonus to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it moves with the target.

A creature can take an action to try to detach the mindmantle from itself, doing so with a successful {@dc 13} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check. On its turn, the mindmantle can detach itself by using 5 feet of movement.

action.name: Darkness Aura (3/Day)
entries: Magical {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} fills a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the mindmantle. This effect lasts while the mindmantle maintains {@status Concentration|XPHB} on it, up to 10 minutes. Darkvision can't penetrate this area, and no light can illuminate it.

bonus.name: Dominate Mind (3/Day)
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 12}, one creature the mindmantle is attached to. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the mindmantle dies or is detached from the target. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target acts as an ally to the mindmantle and is under its control while attached. In addition, the mindmantle and the target can communicate telepathically, and the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target can sense its surroundings as if it has the mindmantle's Blindsight.

The {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target must use its action before moving on each of its turns to make a melee attack against a creature other than itself that the mindmantle mentally chooses. The target can act normally on its turn if the mindmantle chooses no creature or if no creature is within its reach.
The target repeats the save each time it takes damage and at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The death knight casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 20}):

trait.name: Fear Aura
entries: The death knight emanates an aura in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} while it doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. {@actSave wis} {@dc 20}, any enemy that starts its turn in the aura. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this death knight's aura for 24 hours.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the death knight fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The death knight has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Marshal Undead
entries: Undead creatures of the death knight's choice (excluding itself) in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the death knight is destroyed before it atones for its evil, it gains a new body in {@dice 1d10} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The new body appears in a location significant to the death knight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The death knight makes three Dread Blade attacks. Dread Blade. Melee {@variantrule Attack Roll|XPHB}: {@hit 12}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Force damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Hellfire Orb {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 20}, each creature in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the death knight can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 42 ({@damage 12d6}) Fire damage plus 42 ({@damage 12d6}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Command Undead
entries: One Undead ally that can see or hear the death knight can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make one attack.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} The death knight is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse} The death knight adds 7 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

legendary.name: Dread Authority
entries: The death knight uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Command|XPHB} (level 3 version). The death knight can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Fell Word
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 20}, one creature the death knight can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Necrotic damage, and the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The death knight can't take this action again until the start of its next turn. Lunge. The death knight moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Dread Blade attack.

legendary.name: Summon Undead
entries: 1 {@creature Wraith|XMM}, {@dice 1d2} {@creature Banshee|XMM|Banshees}, or {@dice 1d4 + 1} {@creature Wight|XMM|Wights} appear in unoccupied spaces within 30 feet of the death knight. The summoned undead are allies to the death knight. In combat, the undead share the death knight's {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but they take their turn immediately after the death knight. The death knight can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The balor casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 21}, {@hit 13} to hit with spell attacks):

trait.name: Death Throes
entries: The balor explodes when it dies. {@actSave dex} {@dc 21}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the balor. {@actSaveFail} 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Fire damage plus 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Force damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If the balor dies outside the Abyss, it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Fire Aura
entries: At the end of each of the balor's turns, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the balor takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the balor fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The balor has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The balor makes one Flame Whip attack and one Lightning Blade attack. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Flame Whip
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 30 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d6 + 8}) Force damage plus 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Fire damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, the balor pulls the target up to 25 feet straight toward itself, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Lightning Blade
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 10 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 3d8 + 8}) Force damage plus 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Lightning damage, and the target can't take Reactions until the start of the balor's next turn.

bonus.name: Teleport
entries: The balor teleports itself or a willing demon within 10 feet of itself up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space the balor can see.

legendary.name: Abyssal Magic
entries: The balor uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Darkness|XPHB}, {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Fear|XPHB}, or {@spell Ray of Sickness|XPHB} (level 5 version). The balor can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The balor moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Flame Whip or Lightning Blade attack.

legendary.name: Unholy Word
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 21}, a creature within 30 feet that can hear the balor. {@actSaveFail} If the target has 25 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer, it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. Otherwise, the target takes 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Psychic damage and has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of the balor's next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The balor can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The barlgura casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

trait.name: Abduct
entries: The barlgura needn't spend extra movement to move a creature it is grappling.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the barlgura dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The barlgura makes one Tormenting Bite attack and two Thrash attacks.

action.name: Tormenting Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 13 ({@damage 2d12}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Thrash
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) or {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition (barlgura's choice).

bonus.name: Leap
entries: The barlgura jumps up to 40 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The barlgura casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: Alpha's Presence
entries: Allies of the barlgura's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the barlgura dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The barlgura makes one Tormenting Bite attack and two Thrash attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Packmaster's Strike.

action.name: Tormenting Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d6 + 6}) Piercing damage plus 13 ({@damage 2d12}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Thrash
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Packmaster's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the barlgura can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one melee attack at a target the barlgura chooses. If the attack hits and the target isn't larger than the ally, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Leap
entries: The barlgura jumps up to 40 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The chasme casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the chasme dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The chasme has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The chasme can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The chasme makes one Proboscis attack and uses Spellcasting.

action.name: Proboscis
entries: +5, reach 5 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 4d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Necrotic damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage. If the target is a creature, its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken.

bonus.name: Drone
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the chasme (demons automatically succeed on this save). {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns. The target succeeds automatically after 10 minutes or if it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to empty a flask of Holy Water on it. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this chasme's Drone for 24 hours.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The glabrezu casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Aura of Discord
entries: The glabrezu emanates an aura in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} while it doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}, any enemy that starts its turn in the aura. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. The {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target must use its action before moving on each of its turns to make a melee attack against a creature other than itself that the glabrezu mentally chooses. The target can act normally on its turn if the glabrezu chooses no creature or if no creature is within its reach. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this glabrezu's aura for 24 hours.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the chasme dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the glabrezu fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The chasme has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The glabrezu makes two Pincer attacks and uses Pummel or Spellcasting.

action.name: Pincer
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 10 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}) from one of two pincers.

action.name: Pummel
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 19}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the glabrezu. {@actSaveFail} 20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

legendary.name: Beguiling Magic
entries: The glabrezu uses Spellcasting to cast Charm

legendary.name: Monster, Dissonant Whispers (level 4 version), or Mirror Image
entries: The glabrezu can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The glabrezu moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Pincer attack.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the goristro dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The goristro has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The goristro deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The goristro makes one Brutal Gore attack and two Slam attacks.

action.name: Brutal Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 10 ft. {@h}41 ({@damage 6d10 + 8}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is pushed up to 20 feet straight away from the goristro and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 10 ft. {@h}30 ({@damage 4d10 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Charge
entries: The goristro moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} straight toward an enemy it can see.

bonus.name: Trampling Charge {@recharge 5}
entries: The goristro moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks and can move through the spaces of Medium or smaller creatures. Each creature whose space the goristro enters is targeted once by the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 22}. {@actSaveFail} 30 ({@damage 4d10 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Alpha's Presence
entries: Allies of the hezrou's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the hezrou dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The hezrou has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Stench
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, any creature that starts its turn in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the hezrou. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hezrou makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Packmaster's Strike.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage.

action.name: Packmaster's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the hezrou can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one melee attack at a target the hezrou chooses. If the attack hits and the target isn't larger than the ally, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Leap
entries: The hezrou jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the immolith dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Fire Aura
entries: At the end of each of the immolith's turns, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the immolith takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Fire Form
entries: The immolith can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so, and it can enter a creature's space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The immolith sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 30-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 30 feet.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The immolith has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The immolith makes two Searing Claw attacks and uses Deathfire {@variantrule Curses|XPHB|Curse}, if available.

action.name: Searing Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Fire damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, any {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Fire damage the target has is nullified.

action.name: Deathfire Curse {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}, one creature the immolith can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Fire damage, and the target is cursed and starts {@hazard burning|XPHB}.

Until the curse is removed or someone douses the target with Holy Water, the creature takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Fire damage at the start of each of its turns. If this damage reduces it to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, the target's body turns into ash. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The marilith casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 20}):

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the marilith dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the marilith fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The marilith has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the marilith's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Reactive
entries: The marilith can take one {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} on every turn of combat.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The marilith makes six Pact Blade attacks and uses Constrict. She can replace two Six Pact Blade attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Pact Blade
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 1d10 + 6}) Force damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 19}, one Medium or smaller creature the marilith can see within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

bonus.name: Command Demon
entries: One demon ally that can see or hear the marilith can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Teleport {@recharge 5}
entries: The marilith teleports up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} The marilith is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse} The marilith adds 6 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

legendary.name: Abyssal Magic
entries: The marilith uses Spellcasting. The marilith can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Coil
entries: The marilith uses Constrict.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The marilith moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The nalfeshnee casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 19}):

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the nalfeshnee dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The nalfeshnee has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the nalfeshnee's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The nalfeshnee makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Commander's Strike or Tactical Maneuvers, or it can replace two attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 10 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Slashing damage plus 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Force damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

action.name: Commander's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the nalfeshnee can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} at a target the nalfeshnee chooses, adding 13 ({@dice 3d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

action.name: Tactical Maneuvers
entries: Each ally within 30 feet of the nalfeshnee can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

bonus.name: Horror Nimbus {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the nalfeshnee. {@actSaveFail} 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition for 1 minute, until it takes damage, or until it ends its turn with the nalfeshnee out of line of sight. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this nalfeshnee's Horror Nimbus for 24 hours.

reaction.name: Pursuit
entries: {@actTrigger} Another creature the nalfeshnee can see ends its move within 120 feet of the nalfeshnee. {@actResponse} The nalfeshnee uses {@spell Teleport|XPHB}, but its destination space must be within 10 feet of the triggering creature.

trait.name: Aura of Insidious Gloom
entries: The demon emanates an aura of insidious shadows in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. Nonmagical light can't illuminate it and if any of this {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}'s area overlaps with an area of {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} created by a spell of level 5 or lower, that spell is dispelled. At the end of each of the demon's turns, each creature in the aura takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage and 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage.

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the demon dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The demon can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Light Sensitivity
entries: While in {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}, the demon has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The demon has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The demon makes two Umbral Claw attacks.

action.name: Umbral Claw
entries: {@atkr m} +7 reach 10 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) Psychic damage, plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the demon takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

spellcasting.name: Dance of Ruin (Recharges after a Long Rest)
headerEntries: While within 5 feet of at least two vrock allies, the vrock can cast {@spell Destructive Wave|XPHB} (necrotic), requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}).

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the vrock dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The vrock has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The vrock makes two Shred attacks and uses Stunning Screech, if available.

action.name: Shred
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Spores {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the vrock. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target takes 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Poison damage at the start of each of its turns. Emptying a flask of Holy Water on the target ends the effect early.

action.name: Stunning Screech (1/Day)
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the vrock (demons succeed automatically). {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Thunder damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of the vrock's next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The yochlol casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

spellcasting.name: Charm
headerEntries: The yochlol casts {@spell Dominate Person|XPHB} (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}).

trait.name: Demonic Restoration
entries: If the yochlol dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Abyss.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The yochlol has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The yochlol can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The yochlol ignores movement restrictions caused by webs.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The yochlol makes two Caustic Lash attacks, and it can use Charm, Draining Kiss, or Spellcasting.

action.name: Caustic Lash
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}33 ({@damage 8d6 + 5}) Acid damage.

action.name: Draining Kiss (Humanoid or Succubus Form Only)
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, one creature {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the yochlol within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

action.name: Spider Vortex {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, each enemy in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the drow. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Piercing damage plus 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The yochlol shape-shifts into a Medium Humanoid, Medium spider, or Succubus, or back into its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

reaction.name: Toxic Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The yochlol is hit by an attack roll. {@actResponse} The yochlol halves the attack's damage to itself (round down), and it teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 30 feet of itself. {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, each creature within 5 feet of the yochlol's destination space. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Barbed Hide
entries: At the start of each of its turns, the devil deals 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Piercing damage to any creature it is grappling or any creature grappling it.

trait.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Nine Hells.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the devil's choice (excluding itself) in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes one Claws attack and one Tail attack, or it makes two Hurl Flame attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Commander's Strike.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) from both claws.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Hurl Flame
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 150 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 6d6}) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts {@hazard burning|XPHB}.

action.name: Commander's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the devil can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} at a target the devil chooses, adding 13 ({@dice 2d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

reaction.name: Redirect Attack
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the devil can see makes an attack roll against it. {@actResponse} The devil chooses a Large or Medium ally within 5 feet of itself. The devil and that ally swap places, and the ally becomes the target of the attack instead.

trait.name: Battle Frenzy
entries: While within 30 feet of at least two allies, the devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes one Beard attack and one Infernal Glaive attack.

action.name: Beard
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of the devil's next turn. Until this poison ends, the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Infernal Glaive
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature and doesn't already have an infernal wound, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target receives an infernal wound. While wounded, the target loses 5 ({@dice 1d10}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. The wound closes after 1 minute, after a spell restores {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} to the target, or after the target or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to stanch the wound, doing so by succeeding on a {@dc 14} Wisdom ({@skill Medicine|XPHB}) check.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The devil casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

spellcasting.name: Fear (3/Day)
headerEntries: The devil casts {@spell Fear|XPHB}, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}).

trait.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Nine Hells.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the devil's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes two Claw attacks and one Infernal Sting attack. It can replace one Claw attack with a use of Scouring Command, or it can replace two Claw attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on its next attack roll before the start of the devil's next turn.

action.name: Infernal Sting
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of the devil's next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Scouring Command
entries: One ally that can see or hear the devil takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage. It can then take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, adding 9 ({@dice 2d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

trait.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Nine Hells.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes two Chain attacks and uses Conjure Infernal Chain.

action.name: Chain
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) from one of two chains, and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Chain Slam
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the devil. {@actSaveFail} 15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the start of the devil's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Conjure Infernal Chain
entries: The devil conjures a fiery chain to bind a creature. {@actSave dex} {@dc 16}, one creature the devil can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Fire damage, and the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, ending the effect on itself on a success, at which point the chain disappears. A creature {@condition restrained} in this way takes 11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Fire damage at the start of each of the devil's turns. If the target is Large or smaller, the devil moves the target up to 30 feet straight toward itself. {@actSaveSuccess} The chain disappears.

action.name: Whirling Chains {@recharge}
entries: The devil moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks. Each creature within 15 feet of it during its movement is targeted once by the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} 26 ({@damage 6d6 + 5}) Slashing damage. The devil can't use this feature if it has a creature {@condition grappled} by any of its chains.

reaction.name: Unnerving Gaze
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the devil can see starts its turn within 30 feet of the devil and can see the devil. {@actResponse d}{@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, the triggering creature. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of its turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this devil's Unnerving Gaze for 24 hours.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The erinyes casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Aura of Dread
entries: Creatures in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the erinyes have their Speeds halved while in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. The erinyes can designate creatures to be unaffected by the aura. Creatures immune to the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition are unaffected. Diabolical Restoration. If the erinyes dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Nine Hells.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the erinyes fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The erinyes has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Rope
entries: The erinyes has a magic rope. While bearing it, the erinyes can use the Entangling Rope action. The rope has AC 21, HP 120, and {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Poison and Psychic damage. The rope turns to dust if reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, if it is 5+ feet away from the erinyes for 1 hour or more, or if the erinyes dies. If the rope is damaged or destroyed, the erinyes can fully restore it when finishing a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The erinyes makes three Withering Sword attacks and can use Entangling Rope or Spellcasting.

action.name: Withering Sword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Force damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage. Entangling Rope (Requires Magic Rope). {@actSave str} {@dc 18}, one creature the erinyes can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Force damage, and the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the rope is destroyed, the erinyes uses a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to release the target, or the erinyes uses Entangling Rope again. While {@condition restrained} in this way, a creature has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} to saving throws.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} The erinyes is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse} The erinyes adds 5 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

trait.name: Diabolical Restoration
