action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes three attacks, using Spiked Chain or Hurl Flame in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Chain Slam or Infernal Tail, or it can replace two attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Spiked Chain
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 10 ft. {@h}21 ({@dice 4d6 + 7}) Force plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Fire damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Chain Slam
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 20}, a creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the devil. {@actSaveFail} 21 ({@damage 4d6 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the start of the devil's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Hurl Flame
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 150 ft. {@h}27 ({@damage 5d8 + 5}) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts {@hazard burning|XPHB}.

action.name: Infernal Tail
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, one creature the devil can see within 10 feet. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 1d8 + 7}) Necrotic damage, and the target receives an infernal wound if it doesn't have one. While wounded, the target loses 10 ({@dice 3d6}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. The wound closes after 1 minute, after a spell restores {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} to the target, or after the target or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to stanch the wound, doing so by succeeding o n a {@dc 18} Wisdom ({@skill Medicine|XPHB}) check.

bonus.name: Command Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the devil can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} at a target the devil chooses.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The devil casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 19}):

spellcasting.name: Ice Wall {@recharge}
headerEntries: The devil casts {@spell Wall of Ice|XPHB} (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 19}).

trait.name: Chilling Aura
entries: At the end of each of the devil's turns, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the devil takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Cold damage.

trait.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Nine Hells.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the devil fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the devil's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes three Ice Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tail attack or a use of Scouring Command, or it can replace two attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Ice Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 12}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Force damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Cold damage. Until the end of its next turn, the target can't take a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} or {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB}, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} decreases by 10 feet, and it can move or take one action on its turn, not both. {@hom}The spear magically returns to the devil's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 10 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Cold damage.

action.name: Scouring Command
entries: One ally that can see or hear the devil takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage. It can then take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, adding 18 ({@dice 4d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

legendary.name: Freeze
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 19}, one creature the devil can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 5d8}) Cold damage, and the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the end of the devil's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendary.name: Infernal Magic
entries: The devil uses Spellcasting. The devil can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The devil moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Ice Spear attack.

spellcasting.name: Hellfire Spellcasting {@recharge 4}
headerEntries: The pit fiend casts {@spell Fireball|XPHB} (level 5 version) twice, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 23}).
It can replace one {@spell Fireball|XPHB} with {@spell Hold Monster|XPHB} (level 7 version), {@spell Power Word Stun|XPHB}, {@spell Programmed Illusion|XPHB}, or {@spell Wall of Fire|XPHB}.

trait.name: Diabolical Restoration
entries: If the pit fiend dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Nine Hells.

trait.name: Fear Aura
entries: The pit fiend emanates an aura in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} while it doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. {@actSave wis} {@dc 23}, any enemy that starts its turn in the aura. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this pit fiend's aura for 24 hours.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the pit fiend fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The pit fiend has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The pit fiend makes one Bite attack, two Devilish Claw attacks, and one Hellfire Mace attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 10 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d6 + 8}) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 23}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Poison damage at the start of each of its turns, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

action.name: Devilish Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 10 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 4d8 + 8}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Hellfire Mace
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 10 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 4d6 + 8}) Force damage plus 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Fire damage, and the target is vulnerable to Fire damage until the end of the pit fiend's next turn.

action.name: Incinerating Gaze (1/Day)
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 23}, each creature in a 120-foot-long, 10-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 42 ({@damage 12d6}) Fire damage. If this damage reduces it to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it and everything nonmagical it is wearing and carrying are disintegrated into ash. The target can be revived only by a {@spell True Resurrection|XPHB} or a {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendary.name: Hellfire Flame
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 23}, one creature the pit fiend can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Fire damage, and the target is vulnerable to Fire damage until the end of the pit fiend's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendary.name: Infernal Magic
entries: The pit fiend uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Charm Monster|XPHB}, {@spell Darkness|XPHB}, {@spell Dimension Door|XPHB} (self only), or {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}.
The pit fiend can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The pit fiend moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Devilish Claw attack.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The devil doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes two attacks, using Infernal Fork and Tail Spine in any combination.

action.name: Infernal Fork
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Tail Spine
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 20/80 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of the devil's next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The devil casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The devil doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The devil makes three attacks, using Infernal Fork and Tail Spine in any combination.

action.name: Infernal Fork
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage, and the next attack roll against the target by an attacker other than the devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} if the attack is made before the start of the devil's next turn.

action.name: Tail Spine
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 20/80 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage, and the next attack roll against the target by an attacker other than the devil has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} if the attack is made before the start of the devil's next turn.

action.name: Spine Volley {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The mosasaurus can hold its breath for 1 hour.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mosasaurus makes one Bite attack and one Tail attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 10 ft. {@h}47 ({@damage 6d12 + 8}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can't be targeted by the mosasaurus's Tail.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 15 ft. {@h}27 ({@damage 3d12 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 20}, one Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the mosasaurus (the mosasaurus can have only one creature swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The mosasaurus swallows the target, which is no longer {@condition Grappled|XPHB}.

While swallowed, a creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the mosasaurus, and takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the mosasaurus's turns.

If the mosasaurus takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the mosasaurus must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls in a space within 10 feet of the mosasaurus and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the mosasaurus dies, a swallowed creature is no longer {@condition Restrained|XPHB} and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The spinosaurus can hold its breath for 1 hour.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The spinosaurus makes one Bite attack, one Claws attack, and one Tail attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 10 ft. {@h}29 ({@damage 4d10 + 7}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can't be targeted by the spinosaurus's Tail.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d6 + 7}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 15 ft. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d8 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Alpha's Presence
entries: Allies of the displacer beast's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Avoidance
entries: If the displacer beast is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Displacement
entries: Attack rolls against the displacer beast have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}, since it projects an illusion that makes it appear to be near its actual location. This trait is suppressed while the displacer beast has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The displacer beast makes one Rend attack and two Tentacle attacks. It can replace two Tentacle attacks with Tentacle Slam.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 feet. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Slashing damage. If target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 15 feet. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d6 + 6}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}) from one of two tentacles.

action.name: Tentacle Slam
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the displacer beast. {@actSaveFail} 20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the start of the displacer beast's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Avoidance
entries: If the displacer beast is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Displacement
entries: Attack rolls against the displacer beast have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}, since it projects an illusion that makes it appear to be near its actual location. This trait is suppressed while the displacer beast has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The displacer beast makes one Rend attack and one Tentacle attack.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 feet. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Slashing damage, plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Slashing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}. If target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 15 feet. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Piercing damage, plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Stealthy
entries: The displacer beast takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

spellcasting.name: Read Thoughts
headerEntries: The doppelganger casts {@spell Detect Thoughts|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}).

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the doppelganger is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the doppelganger instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The doppelganger makes three attacks, using Shortsword, Slam, or Light Crossbow in any combination, and uses Unsettling Visage if available.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage, plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of the doppelganger's next turn.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} (with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} during the first round of each combat), reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage, plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Bludgeoning damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

action.name: Light Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, range 80/320 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage, plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

action.name: Unsettling Visage {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the doppelganger that can see the doppelganger. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The doppelganger takes the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The doppelganger shape-shifts into a Medium or Small Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The doppelganger casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

spellcasting.name: Read Thoughts
headerEntries: The doppelganger casts {@spell Detect Thoughts|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The doppelganger makes three attacks, using Rapier or Befuddling Bolt in any combination, and uses Unsettling Visage if available.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage, and the doppelganger has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes against the target before the end of this turn.

action.name: Befuddling Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 90 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws until the end of the doppelganger's next turn.

action.name: Unsettling Visage {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the doppelganger that can see the doppelganger. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

bonus.name: Dark Whispers
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, a creature the doppelganger can see within 30 feet and can hear the doppelganger. {@actSaveFail} The target takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Psychic damage and has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the start of the doppelganger's next turn. The {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target must use its action before moving on each of its turns to make a melee attack against a creature other than itself that the doppelganger mentally chooses. The target can act normally on its turn if the doppelganger chooses no creature or if no creature is within its reach. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this doppelganger's Dark Whispers for 24 hours.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The doppelganger shape-shifts into a Medium or Small Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

spellcasting.name: Read Thoughts
headerEntries: The doppelganger casts {@spell Detect Thoughts|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}).

spellcasting.name: Disappearing Step
headerEntries: Trigger: The doppelganger takes damage. Response: The doppelganger casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The doppelganger makes two Slam attacks and uses Bewildering Word or Unsettling Visage, if available.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} (with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} during the first round of each combat), reach 5 ft. Hit 11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Bewildering Word
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, a creature the doppelganger can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls until the end of the doppelganger's next turn.

action.name: Unsettling Visage {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the doppelganger that can see the doppelganger. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. entries: The drider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the drider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The drider makes three attacks, using Foreleg or Poison Burst in any combination.

action.name: Foreleg
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Poison Burst
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 120 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Poison damage.

action.name: Hellfire
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 10-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the drider can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Fire damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The drow casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (3/Day)
headerEntries: The drow casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} or {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The drow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drow has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The drow makes two attacks, using Rapier or Sorcerous Burst in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Force damage, and the drow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes against the target before the end of this turn.

action.name: Sorcerous Burst
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 6}, range 120 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d8}) Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, Psychic, or Thunder damage (drow's choice).

action.name: Forked Lightning {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, Up to three creatures the drow can within 60 feet of itself. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Lightning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Quickened Spell (2/Day)
entries: The drow uses Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The drow casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

spellcasting.name: Fiendish Rebuke (2/Day)
headerEntries: The drow casts {@spell Hellish Rebuke|XPHB} (level 3 version) in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The drow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.

trait.name: Fiendish Blessing
entries: The AC of the drow includes its Charisma bonus.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drow has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The drow makes three Rend attacks, or two Hellfire Burst attacks.

action.name: Rend (Demon Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Hellfire Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Abyssal Rift {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point the drow can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} {@dice 1d6} dretches and {@dice 1d2} rutterkins appear in unoccupied spaces in the sphere.
The summoned Demons are allies to the drow. In combat, the Demons share the drow's {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but they take their turn immediately after the drow.

bonus.name: Demonbind (1/Day)
entries: The drow shape-shifts into a Large Demon.

Horns grow from the drow's head, its skin turns leathery, batlike wings unfurl from its back, and its hands turn into vicious claws. While in this form, the drow's species changes to Fiend (Demon), and it gains 50 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, resistance to Cold, Fire, and Lightning damage, and immunity to Poison damage and the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

headerEntries: The drow casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The drow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drow has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage, plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

action.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage, plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The drow takes the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

reaction.name: Lolth's Whispers (3/Day)
entries: Trigger. An ally that can hear the drow and attacks a creature within 5 feet of the drow. {@actResponse} The drow grants {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} to the ally's attack roll. If the attack hits, it deals an extra 10 ({@damage 3d6}) weapon damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The drow casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 11}):

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The drow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the drow's choice (excluding itself) in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drow has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The drow makes two attacks, using Rapier or Drow Hand Crossbow in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Maneuver Allies, if available.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage, and the drow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes against the target before the end of this turn.

action.name: Drow Hand Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the target makes a saving throw. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 hour. If the target fails the save by 5 or more, it also has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition while {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} in this way. The target wakes up if it takes damage or if a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

action.name: Maneuver Allies {@recharge 5}
entries: Each ally within 30 feet of the drow can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The drow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.

trait.name: Skirmish Advantage
entries: Immediately after ending its movement

15+ feet from the space it started its turn, the drow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its turn. The drow can only gain this {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} once per turn.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drow has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The drow makes two attacks, using Shortsword or Drow Hand Crossbow in any combination.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Drow Hand Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the target makes a saving throw. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 hour. If the target fails the save by 5 or more, it also has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition while {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} in this way. The target wakes up if it takes damage or if a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

bonus.name: Lightfooted
entries: The drow takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} or {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The dryad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):
will: {@spell Charm Monster|XPHB} (lasts 24 hours; ends early if the dryad casts the spell again)

spellcasting.name: Disappearing Step
headerEntries: Trigger: The dryad takes damage. Response: The dryad casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability, and has the Invisible condition until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dryad has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
entries: The dryad can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dryad makes two attacks, using Noxious Vine Lash or Noxious Thorn Burst in any combination, and it can use Bewildering Word or Spellcasting to cast {@spell Charm Monster|XPHB}.

action.name: Noxious Vine Lash
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the dryad's next turn.
While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Wisdom saving throws.

action.name: Noxious Thorn Burst
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, range 60 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Bewildering Word
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, a creature the dryad can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage and has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls until the end of the dryad's next turn.

bonus.name: Tree Stride
entries: If within 5 feet of a Large or bigger tree, the dryad teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a second Large or bigger tree that is within 60 feet of the previous tree.

spellcasting.name: Duergar Magic (2/Day)
headerEntries: The duergar casts {@spell Enlarge/Reduce|XPHB} (self only) or {@spell Invisibility|XPHB} (self only), requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

trait.name: Duergar Resilience
entries: The duergar has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB}, {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, and {@condition Stunned|XPHB} conditions, as well as against spells and illusions.

trait.name: Phalanx Formation
entries: The duergar has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and Dexterity saving throws while standing within 5 feet of an ally wielding a shield that doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the duergar has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The duergar makes two attacks, using War Pick or Javelin in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Call to Attack, if available.

action.name: War Pick
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes before the start of the duergar's next turn.

action.name: Javelin
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Call to Attack {@recharge 5}
entries: Up to three allies that can see or hear the duergar can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} at a target the duergar chooses, adding 9 ({@dice 2d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

spellcasting.name: Duergar Magic (3/Day)

trait.name: Heroic Warrior (1/Day)
entries: The duergar can reroll any die immediately after rolling it, and it must use the new roll.

trait.name: Improved Critical
entries: The duergar's attack rolls and Unarmed Strikes can score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} on a roll of 19 or 20 on the {@dice d20}.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the duergar has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Maul

action.name: Javelin
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Second Wind (Recharge after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The duergar regains 16 ({@dice 1d10 + 11}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

entries: The elemental makes two Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Fling.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Fling
entries: The elemental throws a Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it to a space it can see within 30 feet of itself that isn't in the air. {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Whelm {@recharge 4}
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 17}, each creature in the elemental's space. {@actSaveFail} 32 ({@damage 6d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}). Until the grapple ends, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, is suffocating unless it can breathe water, and takes 18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage at the start of each of the elemental's turns. The elemental can grapple one Huge creature, two Large creatures, or up to four Medium or smaller creatures at a time with Whelm. As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the elemental can pull a creature out of it by succeeding on a {@dc 17} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Freeze
entries: If the elemental takes Cold damage, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} decreases by 20 feet until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Water Form
entries: The elemental can enter an enemy's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The elemental makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Small or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Whelm {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 13}, each creature in the elemental's space. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d8 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). Until the grapple ends, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, is suffocating unless it can breathe water, and takes 7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage at the start of each of the elemental's turns. The elemental can grapple one Medium creature or up to two Small or smaller creatures at a time with Whelm. As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the elemental can pull a creature out of it by succeeding on a {@dc 13} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Cave Strider
entries: The ettercap ignores {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} caused by slippery or uneven terrain in a cave or underground environment.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The ettercap can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The ettercap ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the ettercap knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ettercap makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks. It can replace one Claw attack with a use of Web Strand, if available.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Poison damage, plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}. If the target is a creature, it has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of the ettercap's next turn.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Slashing damage, plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Slashing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

headerEntries: The ettercap casts {@spell Aid|XPHB}, {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Faerie Fire|XPHB}, or {@spell Healing Word|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Alpha's Presence
entries: Allies of the ettercap's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Speak with Spiders
entries: The ettercap can communicate simple concepts to spiders when it speaks in Sylvan.

While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the creature can take either an action or a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on its turn, not both. In addition, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved and it can't take Reactions.

action.name: Packmaster's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the ettercap can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one melee attack at a target the ettercap chooses. If the attack hits and the target isn't larger than the ally, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Summon Spiders (Recharge after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@dice 2d4} giant wolf spiders and {@dice 1d2} giant spiders appear in unoccupied spaces within 30 feet of the ettercap. The summoned spiders are allies to the ettercap. In combat, the spiders share the ettercap's {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but they take their turn immediately after the ettercap.

bonus.name: Reel

entries: The ettin moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks. Each creature within 5 feet of it during its movement is targeted once by the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} 24 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) Slashing damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Concentration

If the ettin is required to make a Constitution saving throw to maintain Concentration, it must make a separate saving throw for each active spell or effect that requires Concentration.

action.name: Rippling Earth {@recharge 5}
entries: The ettin causes the earth in front of it to move in a sudden and violent, cascading motion. {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each creature standing on the ground in a 30-foot-long, 10-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 29 ({@damage 4d12 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is pushed up to 20 feet straight away from the ettin and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

entries: When the flameskull makes an ability check or saving throw, it can add {@dice 1d10} to the roll. It can do so after seeing the roll but before any of the roll's effects occur.

entries: The flameskull sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 15-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 15 feet.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The flameskull has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the flameskull is destroyed, it regains all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in 1 hour unless Holy Water is sprinkled on its remains or the {@spell Dispel Evil and Good|XPHB} spell is cast on them.

The boulder takes its turn immediately after the galeb duhr on the same {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, and it obeys the galeb duhr. A boulder remains animate for 1 minute or until it or the galeb duhr dies.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The dao casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 21}):

trait.name: Earth Glide
entries: The dao can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dao doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

trait.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the dao dies outside the Elemental Plane of Earth, its body dissolves into dirt, and it gains a new body in {@dice 1d4} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere on the Plane of Earth.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the dao fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dao has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Wishes
entries: The dao knows the {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell and can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the dao can understand. If the dao casts the spell for the creature, the dao suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the dao has cast it three times, the dao can't do so again for 365 days.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dao makes three Earthen Maul attacks or two Earth Burst attacks. It can replace one attack with the use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Earthen Magma Maul
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 10 ft. {@h}29 ({@damage 6d6 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Earth Burst
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 15}, range 120 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 3d8 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage. {@hom}Earth explodes from the target's space, creating the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 21}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from and including the target. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Thunder damage, and if the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

legendary.name: Earth Strike
entries: The dao makes one Earth Burst attack. The dao can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Earthen Magic
entries: The dao uses Spellcasting. The dao can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Earthen Teleport
entries: The dao teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see within 5 feet of an earthen or stony surface. The dao can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The dao moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and makes one Earthen Maul attack.

headerEntries: The dao casts {@spell Bane|XPHB} (level 2 version) or {@spell Command|XPHB} (level 2 version), requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Aura of Tyranny
entries: The dao emanates an aura in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} while it doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}, any enemy that starts its turn in the aura. {@actSaveFail} the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of the dao's next turn. If the target is already {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, it instead takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this dao's Aura of Tyranny for 24 hours.

trait.name: Earth Glide
entries: The dao can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dao doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

trait.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the dao dies outside the Elemental Plane of Earth, its body dissolves into dirt, and it gains a new body in {@dice 1d4} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere on the Plane of Earth.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dao has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Wishes
entries: The dao has a 60 percent chance of knowing the {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell. If the dao knows it, the dao can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the dao can understand. If the dao casts the spell for the creature, the dao suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the dao has cast it three times, the dao can't do so again for 365 days.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dao makes three attacks, using Earthen Maul or Chain Whip in any combination, or two Earth Burst attacks. It can replace one attack with Scouring Command or Spellcasting.

action.name: Earthen Maul
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 5 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d6 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Chain Whip
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 15 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d6 + 7}) Slashing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the dao pulls the target up to 15 feet straight toward itself, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Earth Burst
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 12}, range 120 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d8 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Psychic damage. {@hom}Earth explodes from the target's space, creating the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from and including the target. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Thunder damage.

action.name: Scouring Command
entries: One ally that can see or hear the devil takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage. It can then take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, adding 18 ({@dice 4d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The djinni casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 22}):
will: {@spell Create Food and Water|XPHB} (can create wine instead of water)

trait.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the djinni dies outside the Elemental Plane of Air, its body dissolves into mist, and it gains a new body in {@dice 1d4} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere on the Plane of Air.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the djinni fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The djinni has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Wishes
entries: The djinni knows the {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell and can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the djinni can understand. If the djinni casts the spell for the creature, the djinni suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the djinni has cast it three times, the djinni can't do so again for 365 days.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The djinni makes three attacks, using Storm Blade or Storm Strike in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Storm Blade
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 10 feet. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d6 + 7}) Slashing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Storm Strike
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 14}, range 120 feet. {@h}22 ({@damage 5d8}) Thunder damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Create Whirlwind
entries: The djinni conjures a whirlwind at a point it can see within 120 feet. The whirlwind fills a 30-foot-radius, 90-foot-high {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} centered on that point. The whirlwind lasts until the djinni's {@status Concentration|XPHB} on it ends. The djinni can move the whirlwind up to 20 feet at the start of each of its turns.

Whenever the whirlwind enters a creature's space or a creature enters the whirlwind, that creature is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 22} (a creature makes this save only once per turn, and the djinni is unaffected). {@actSaveFail} While in the whirlwind, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and moves with the whirlwind. At the start of each of its turns, the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} target takes 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Thunder damage. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

legendary.name: Strike
entries: The djinni makes one Storm Strike attack.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The djinni moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and makes one Storm Blade attack.

legendary.name: Teleport
entries: The djinni teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. The djinni can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Wind Magic
entries: The djinni uses Spellcasting. The djinni can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The djinni casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 19}):
will: {@spell Create Food and Water|XPHB} (can create wine instead of water)

trait.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the djinni dies outside the Elemental Plane of Air, its body dissolves into mist, and it gains a new body in {@dice 1d4} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere on the Plane of Air.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The djinni has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spirit Away
entries: A the start of each of the djinni's turns, each creature of the djinni's choice in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the djinni doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks during its movement. The effect lasts until the start of the djinni's next turn.

trait.name: Wishes
entries: The djinni has a 60 percent chance of knowing the {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell. If the djinni knows it, the djinni can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the djinni can understand. If the djinni casts the spell for the creature, the djinni suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the djinni has cast it three times, the djinni can't do so again for 365 days.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The djinni makes three attacks, using Storm Blade or Storm Bow in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Storm Blade
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 feet. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Lightning damage.

action.name: Storm Bow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 300/1200 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Thunder damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Create Whirlwind
entries: The djinni conjures a whirlwind at a point it can see within 120 feet. The whirlwind fills a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high {@variantrule Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder} centered on that point. The whirlwind lasts until the djinni's {@status Concentration|XPHB} on it ends. The djinni can move the whirlwind up to 20 feet at the start of each of its turns.

Whenever the whirlwind enters a creature's space or a creature enters the whirlwind, that creature is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 18} (a creature makes this save only once per turn, and the djinni is unaffected). {@actSaveFail} While in the whirlwind, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and moves with the whirlwind. At the start of each of its turns, the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} target takes 24 ({@damage 7d6}) Thunder damage. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

reaction.name: Intercepting Wind
entries: {@actTrigger} An attack roll hits a creature that the djinni can see while within 30 feet of the djinni. {@actResponse} The creature gains a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack and possibly causing it to miss, until the start of the djinni's next turn.

trait.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the efreeti dies outside the Elemental Plane of Fire, its body dissolves into dirt, and it gains a new body in {@dice 1d4} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere on the Plane of Fire.

action.name: Heated Blade
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d6 + 8}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 2d12}) Fire damage.

action.name: Hurl Flame
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 13}, range 120 ft. {@h}28 ({@damage 8d6}) Fire damage.

legendary.name: Flame
entries: The efreeti makes one Hurl Flame attack.

legendary.name: Fiery Teleport
entries: The efreeti teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see within 5 feet of a fire. The efreeti can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The efreeti moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and makes one Heated Blade attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The efreeti casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the efreeti dies outside the Elemental Plane of Fire, its body dissolves into dirt, and it gains a new body in {@dice 1d4} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere on the Plane of Fire.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The efreeti has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

If the efreeti casts the spell for the creature, the efreeti suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the efreeti has cast it three times, the efreeti can't do so again for 365 days.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The efreeti makes three attacks, using Heated Blade or Hurl Flame in any combination. It can replace two attacks with a use of Spellcasting or Arcing Flames, if available.

action.name: Heated Blade
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d6 + 7}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 2d12}) Fire damage, and the target is Vulnerable to Fire damage until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Hurl Flame
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 120 ft. {@h}24 ({@damage 7d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Arcing Flames {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 20}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the efreeti. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 2d6 + 7}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 2d12}) Fire damage, and the target is burning. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} The efreeti hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse} The efreeti adds 5 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss. If the attack misses as a result, the attacker takes 13 ({@damage 2d12}) Fire damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The marid casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

spellcasting.name: Misty Veil {@recharge 5}
headerEntries: The marid casts {@spell Fog Cloud|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The marid can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If the marid dies outside the Elemental Plane of Water, its body dissolves into brine, and it gains a new body in {@dice 1d4} days, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere on the Plane of Water.

trait.name: Wishes
entries: The marid has a 60 percent chance of knowing the {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell. If the marid knows it, the marid can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the marid can understand. If the marid casts the spell for the creature, the marid suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the marid has cast it three times, the marid can't do so again for 365 days.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The marid makes three Aquatic Lash attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Aquatic Lash
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 20 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d8 + 7}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Cold damage. If the target is a creature, it can't take Reactions; its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved; and it can take either an action or a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on its turn, not both.
This effect lasts until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Water Jet
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 21}, each creature in a 60-foot-long, 10-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 38 ({@damage 11d6}) Cold damage.
If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is pushed up to 30 feet straight away from the marid and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

If the marid casts the spell for the creature, the marid suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the marid has cast it three times, the marid can't do so again for 365 days.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The marid makes three Aquatic Lash attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Aquatic Lash
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 20 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 3d8 + 8}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Cold damage.

action.name: Water Jet
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 24}, each creature in a 120-foot-long, 10-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 45 ({@damage 13d6}) Cold damage, and if the target is a creature, it is pushed up to 40 feet straight away from the marid and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendary.name: Aquan Teleport
entries: The marid teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see within 5 feet of water. The marid can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Chilling Whip
entries: The marid makes one Aquatic Lash attack.

spellcasting.name: Etherealness
headerEntries: The ghost casts the {@spell Etherealness|XPHB} spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. The ghost is visible on the Material Plane while on the Border Ethereal and vice versa, but it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.

trait.name: Ethereal Sight
entries: The ghost can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The ghost can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghost makes two Withering Blade attacks.

action.name: Withering Blade
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d10}) Slashing damage plus 20 ({@damage 3d10 + 4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Horrific Visage
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone} that can see the ghost and isn't an Undead. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of the ghost's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this ghost's Horrific Visage for 24 hours.

action.name: Possession {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 15}, one Humanoid the ghost can see within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is possessed by the ghost; the ghost disappears, and the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and loses control of its body. The ghost now controls the body, but the target retains awareness.

The ghost can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that specifically target Undead. The ghost's game statistics are the same, except it uses the possessed target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, as well as the target's Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution modifiers.

The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or the ghost leaves as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}. When the possession ends, the ghost appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target, and the target is immune to this ghost's {@variantrule Possession|XPHB} for 24 hours.
{@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this ghost's {@variantrule Possession|XPHB} for 24 hours.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} The ghost is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse} The ghost adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

action.name: Possession {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 14}, one Humanoid the ghost can see within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is possessed by the ghost; the ghost disappears, and the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and loses control of its body. The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or the ghost leaves as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}. When the possession ends, the ghost appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target, and the target is immune to this ghost's {@variantrule Possession|XPHB} for 24 hours.
{@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this ghost's {@variantrule Possession|XPHB} for 24 hours.

headerEntries: The ghost casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting

trait.name: Stench

items.entry: The target takes no action or {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} and uses all its movement to move in a random direction.
The target makes a melee attack against a randomly determined creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.

If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} and {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}) from one of two pseudopods. The target dies if it is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by this attack. Its body is then absorbed into the horror, leaving only equipment behind.

action.name: Blinding Spittle {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 15-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 12 ({@damage 3d6 + 2}) Radiant damage, and the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the end of the horror's next turn.

entries: {@dice 2d4 + 2} hyenas or {@dice 1d2} giant hyenas appear in unoccupied spaces within 30 feet of the gnoll. The summoned hyenas are allies to the gnoll. In combat, the gnolls share the gnoll's {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but they take their turn immediately after the gnoll.

bonus.name: Go for the Throat
entries: One hyena ally that can see or hear the gnoll can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make one attack against a creature with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the hyena's attack roll hits, it is a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Rampage (2/Day)
entries: Immediately after dealing damage to a creature that is already {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, the gnoll moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Rend attack.

It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Berserk
entries: Whenever the golem starts its turn {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, roll {@dice 1d6}. On a 6, the golem goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the golem attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the golem attacks an object. Once the golem goes berserk, it continues to be berserk until it is destroyed or it is no longer {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

entries: The golem can't shape-shift.

entries: The golem has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries: If the golem takes Fire damage, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Berserk
entries: Whenever the golem starts its turn {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, roll {@dice 1d6}. On a 6, the golem goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the golem attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the golem attacks an object. Once the golem goes berserk, it remains so until it is destroyed or it is no longer {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

The golem's creator, if within 60 feet of the berserk golem, can try to calm it by taking an action to make a {@dc 18} Charisma ({@skill Persuasion|XPHB}) check; the golem must be able to hear its creator. If this check succeeds, the golem ceases being berserk until the start of its next turn, at which point it resumes rolling for the Berserk trait again if it is still {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

Each creature whose space the golem enters is targeted once by the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 23}. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 4d8 + 9}) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Fire damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Tendril
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 20 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the greenvise pulls the target 15 feet straight toward itself.

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 17}, one Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the greenvise (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The target is swallowed by the greenvise, and the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition ends. A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the greenvise, and takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the greenvise's turns.

If the greenvise takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the greenvise must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the greenvise and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the greenvise dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 10 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Death Fog (1/Day)
entries: The greenvise emits a greenish, poisonous fog that fills a 30-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on itself. The fog is {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB} and lasts for 1 minute or until a strong wind or similar effect disperses the fog. {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, each creature within the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere}. A creature must also make this save when it enters the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} or ends its turn there. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved. It also can take either an action or a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on its turn, not both, and it can't take Reactions. The greenvise is immune to this effect.
