trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The worm can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 5-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The worm makes one Bite attack and one Tail Stinger attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d8 + 7}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Tail Stinger
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d6 + 7}) Piercing damage plus 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Poison damage.

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 18}, one Medium or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the worm (it can have up to three creatures swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The target is swallowed by the worm, and the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition ends. A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the worm, and takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the worm's turns.

If the worm takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the worm must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the worm and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the worm dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The worm makes one Bite attack and one Tail Stinger attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Small or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Tail Stinger
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d4 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Poison damage.

entries: Allies of the quaggoth's choice (excluding itself) in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Bloodied Fury
entries: While {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, the quaggoth has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The quaggoth makes two attacks, using Maul or Claw in any combination.

action.name: Maul
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage, or 18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage if the quaggoth is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Slashing damage, or 14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Slashing damage if the quaggoth is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Battle Roar (1/Day)
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each enemy that can hear the quaggoth in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the quaggoth. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the quaggoth's next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} Each ally that can hear the quaggoth can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one melee attack.

headerEntries: The quaggoth casts {@spell Feather Fall|XPHB} or {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

entries: While {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, the quaggoth has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls.

action.name: Claw

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The rakshasa casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Greater Magic Resistance
entries: The rakshasa automatically succeeds on saving throws against spells and other magical effects, and the attack rolls of spells automatically miss it. Without the rakshasa's permission, no spell can observe the rakshasa remotely or detect its thoughts, creature type, or alignment.

trait.name: Fiendish Restoration
entries: If the rakshasa dies outside the Nine Hells, its body turns to ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Nine Hells.

trait.name: Marshal Undead
entries: Undead creatures of the rakshasa's choice in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

entries: The rakshasa makes three Cursed Touch attacks or three Necrotic Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 19 ({@damage 3d12}) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target gains no benefit from finishing a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

action.name: Necrotic Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 120 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Necrotic damage and the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Baleful Command {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}, each enemy in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the rakshasa. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} and {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} conditions until the start of the rakshasa's next turn.

entries: Whenever an enemy in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the rakshasa targets the rakshasa with an attack roll or a harmful spell or effect, and the rakshasa isn't {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, the creature is subjected to the following effect.

entries: {@actSaveFail} The creature regards every creature it can see, other than the rakshasa, as an enemy until the start of its next turn. It must then randomly choose a new target for the attack or spell from among those enemies within range. {@actSaveSuccess} The creature is immune to this rakshasa's Aura of Misdirection for 24 hours.

entries: The rakshasa automatically succeeds on saving throws against spells and other magical effects, and the attack rolls of spells automatically miss it. Without the rakshasa's permission, no spell can observe the rakshasa remotely or detect its thoughts, creature type, or alignment.

entries: If the rakshasa is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the rakshasa instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Greater Magic Resistance
entries: The rakshasa automatically succeeds on saving throws against spells and other magical effects, and the attack rolls of spells automatically miss it. Without the rakshasa's permission, no spell can observe the rakshasa remotely or detect its thoughts, creature type, or alignment.

entries: If the rakshasa dies outside the Nine Hells, its body turns to ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Nine Hells.

If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target gains no benefit from finishing a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}, each enemy in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the rakshasa. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} and {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} conditions until the start of the rakshasa's next turn.

bonus.name: Shadow Step
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the rakshasa teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see that is in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the rakshasa takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

entries: The rakshasa automatically succeeds on saving throws against spells and other magical effects, and the attack rolls of spells automatically miss it. Without the rakshasa's permission, no spell can observe the rakshasa remotely or detect its thoughts, creature type, or alignment.

entries: If the rakshasa dies outside the Nine Hells, its body turns to ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} somewhere in the Nine Hells.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The rakshasa makes three attacks, using Longsword or Cursed Touch in any combination. It can replace one attack with Shield Bash or a use of Spellcasting to cast {@spell Vampiric Touch|XPHB}.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Force damage.

action.name: Cursed Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 2d12}) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target gains no benefit from finishing a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

action.name: Shield Bash
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 17}, one creature within 5 feet that the rakshasa can see. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 3d4 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Baleful Command {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}, each enemy in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the rakshasa. {@actSaveFail} 24 ({@damage 7d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} and {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} conditions until the start of the rakshasa's next turn.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} The rakshasa is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse} The rakshasa adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

trait.name: Heat Aura
entries: At the end of each of the remorhaz's turns, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the remorhaz takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Fire damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The remorhaz makes one Bite attack and one Tail attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 15 ft. {@h}25 ({@damage 3d10 + 9}) Piercing damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Fire damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 19}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15}, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 1d10 + 9}) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Fire damage.

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 23}, one Huge or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the remorhaz (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The target is swallowed by the remorhaz, and the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition ends. A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, it has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the remorhaz, and it takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Fire damage at the start of each of the remorhaz's turns.

If the remorhaz takes 40 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the remorhaz must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the remorhaz and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the remorhaz dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The revenant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The revenant regains 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. If the revenant takes Fire or Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. Its body is destroyed only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Undead Restoration
entries: If the revenant dies, it revives 24 hours later in a different body unless {@spell Dispel Evil and Good|XPHB} is cast on its corpse. If it revives, it animates a Humanoid corpse elsewhere on the same plane of existence; it now looks different but uses the same stat block and returns with all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The revenant uses Vengeful Glare and makes two Greataxe or Slam attacks. It can replace Vengeful Glare with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Greataxe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 1d12 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage, or 18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Necrotic damage if the target is cursed by the revenant (see Vow of Revenge).

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Vengeful Glare
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, one creature the revenant can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. If the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} target is cursed by the revenant (see Vow of Revenge), the target also has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition for the duration.

bonus.name: Vow of Revenge (2/Day)
entries: The revenant curses one creature it can see within 30 feet of itself. The revenant knows the distance to and direction of the cursed target, even if it is on a different plane of existence. The curse ends on the target if the revenant uses this {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on a different creature.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The roc makes two Beak attacks. It can replace one attack with a Talons attack.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 2d12 + 7}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Talons
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d6 + 7}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}) from both talons, and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

reaction.name: Swoop {@recharge 5}
entries: If the roc has a creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the roc flies up to half its {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks and drops that creature.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The roper has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The roper can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The roper makes four Tentacle attacks, uses Reel, and makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}24 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 60 ft. {@h}The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}) from one of six tentacles, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

The tentacle can be damaged, freeing a creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB} when destroyed (AC 21, HP 20, {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Poison and Psychic damage). Damaging the tentacle deals no damage to the roper, and a destroyed tentacle regrows at the start of the roper's next turn.

action.name: Reel
entries: The roper pulls each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it up to 30 feet straight toward it.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The urophion casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The urophion has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The urophion can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The urophion makes two Tentacle attacks, uses Reel, and makes two Bite attacks. It can replace two Bite attacks with a use of Extract Brain, Spellcasting, or Mind Blast, if available.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 60 ft. {@h}The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) from one of six tentacles, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

The tentacle can be damaged, freeing a creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB} when destroyed (AC 21, HP 10, {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Poison and Psychic damage). Damaging the tentacle deals no damage to the urophion, and a destroyed tentacle regrows at the start of the urophion's next turn.

action.name: Extract Brain
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, one creature that is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the urophion's Tentacles. {@actSaveFail} 55 ({@damage 10d10}) Piercing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If this damage reduces the target to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, the urophion kills it and devours its brain.

action.name: Reel
entries: The urophion pulls each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it up to 30 feet straight toward it.

action.name: Mind Blast {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 30 ({@damage 6d8 + 3}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of the urophion's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Iron Scent
entries: The rust monster can pinpoint the location of ferrous metal within 60 feet of itself.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The rust monster makes two Bite attacks and uses Antennae twice.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Antennae
entries: The rust monster targets one metal object—armor or a weapon—worn or carried by a creature within 5 feet of itself. {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, the creature with the object. {@actSaveFail} The object takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers (armor) or to its attack rolls (weapon). Armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10, and a weapon is destroyed if its penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the {@spell Mending|XPHB} spell on the armor or weapon.

action.name: Destroy Metal
entries: The rust monster touches a metal object within 5 feet of itself that isn't being worn or carried. The touch destroys a 1-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} of the object.

reaction.name: Reflexive Antennae
entries: {@actTrigger} An attack roll hits the rust monster. {@actResponse} The rust monster uses Antennae.

entries: If the sahuagin fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

entries: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it must be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating outside water.

trait.name: Shark Telepathy
entries: The sahuagin can magically control sharks within 120 feet of itself, using a special telepathy.

monster.name: Runic Shield Guardian
languages: understands commands given in any language but can't speak

spellcasting.name: Force Field (1/Day)
headerEntries: The guardian casts {@spell Wall of Force|XPHB} using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability.

trait.name: Bound
entries: The guardian is magically bound to an amulet. While the guardian and its amulet are on the same plane of existence, the amulet's wearer can telepathically call the guardian to travel to it, and the guardian knows the distance and direction to the amulet.
If the guardian is within 60 feet of the amulet's wearer, half of any damage the wearer takes (round up) is transferred to the guardian.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The guardian regains 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

trait.name: Spell Storing
entries: A spellcaster who wears the guardian's amulet can cause the guardian to store one spell of level 5 or lower. To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the guardian while within 5 feet of it. The spell has no effect but is stored within the guardian.

Any previously stored spell is lost when a new spell is stored. The guardian can cast the spell stored with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no spell components and using the caster's spellcasting ability. The stored spell is then lost.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The guardian makes two Fist attacks.

action.name: Fist
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 10 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Force damage.

entries: Lightning erupts from the shield guardian. {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the guardian. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Lightning damage and the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of the guardian's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

headerEntries: The slaad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 20}):

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the slaad fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The slaad has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The slaad regains 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The slaad makes two attacks, using Chaos Claw or Chaos Spittle in any combination.

action.name: Chaos Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 13}, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d6 + 7}) Slashing damage plus 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage. Until the start of the slaad's next turn, the target has a condition determined by rolling {@dice 1d4}: on a 1, {@condition Charmed|XPHB}; on a 2, {@condition Frightened|XPHB}; on a 3, {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}; or on a 4, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}.

action.name: Chaos Spittle
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 13}, range 60 ft. {@h}Roll {@dice 1d8}: on a 1, 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Acid damage; on a 2, 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Cold damage; on a 3, 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Fire damage; on a 4, 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Lightning damage; on a 5, 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Necrotic damage; on a 6, 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Poison damage; on a 7, 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Radiant damage; or on a 8, 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Thunder damage.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The slaad shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

legendary.name: Chaos Magic
entries: The slaad uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Blight|XPHB} (level 5 version), {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, {@spell Fear|XPHB}, {@spell Invisibility|XPHB} (self only), or {@spell Major Image|XPHB}.
The slaad can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Deathly Teleport
entries: The slaad teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and each creature within 10 feet of the space it left takes 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The slaad moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Chaos Claw attack.

trait.name: Inscrutable
entries: No magic can observe the sphinx remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom ({@skill Insight|XPHB}) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The sphinx has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

entries: No magic can observe the sphinx remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom ({@skill Insight|XPHB}) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 11}, one creature within 5 feet the sprite can see (Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save). {@actSaveFail} The sprite knows the target's emotions and alignment.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The sprite casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

spellcasting.name: Invisibility
headerEntries: The sprite casts {@spell Invisibility|XPHB} on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The sprite makes two attacks, using Needle Sword or Enchanting Bow in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Heart Sight or Invisibility.

action.name: Needle Sword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d4 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Enchanting Bow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 40/160 ft. {@h}1 Piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the start of the sprite's next turn.

action.name: Heart Sight
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 11}, one creature within 5 feet the sprite can see (Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save). {@actSaveFail} The sprite knows the target's emotions and alignment.

trait.name: Anesthetic Proboscis
entries: When the stirge hits a creature with its Proboscis, it can attempt to remain unnoticed as it attaches.

The stirge makes a Dexterity ({@skill Stealth|XPHB}) check contested by the target's passive Wisdom ({@skill Perception|XPHB}). This check is made by the DM in secret. On a success, the target doesn't perceive the hit or the attachment, takes the damage without awareness, and the stirge remains attached. The effect ends if the target takes an action to examine itself, is alerted by another creature, or if the stirge is otherwise revealed.

action.name: Proboscis
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage, and the stirge attaches to the target. While attached, the stirge can't make Proboscis attacks, and the target takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage at the start of each of the stirge's turns. The stirge can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can detach the stirge as an action.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the stirge takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

trait.name: Swarm
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny stirge. The swarm can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

action.name: Proboscis
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}24 ({@damage 6d6 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the swarm attaches to the target. While attached, the swarm can't make Proboscis attacks, and the target takes 15 ({@damage 6d4}) Necrotic damage at the start of each of the swarm's turns. The swarm can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can detach the swarm as an action with a successful {@dc 13} Strength check.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The succubus casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

spellcasting.name: Charm
headerEntries: The succubus casts {@spell Dominate Person|XPHB} (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}).

trait.name: Incubus Form
entries: When the succubus finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, it can shape-shift into an Incubus, using that stat block instead of this one.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The succubus makes one Fiendish Touch or Befuddling Bolt attack and uses Charm or Draining Kiss.

action.name: Fiendish Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Befuddling Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, range 90 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Psychic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws until the end of the succubus's next turn.

action.name: Draining Kiss
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, one creature {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the succubus within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

bonus.name: Dark Whispers
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, a creature the succubus can see within 30 feet and can hear the succubus. {@actSaveFail} The target takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage and has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the start of the succubus's next turn.

The {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target must use its action before moving on each of its turns to make a melee attack against a creature other than itself that the succubus mentally chooses. The target can act normally on its turn if the succubus chooses no creature or if no creature is within its reach. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this succubus's Dark Whispers for 24 hours.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The succubus shape-shifts into a Medium or Small Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except its {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} is available only in its true form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (6/Day)
entries: If the tarrasque fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The tarrasque has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Reflective Carapace
entries: If the tarrasque is targeted by a {@spell Magic Missile|XPHB} spell or a spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll {@dice 1d6}.
On a 1-5, the tarrasque is unaffected. On a 6, the tarrasque is unaffected and reflects the spell, turning the caster into the target.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The tarrasque regains 100 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The tarrasque deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The tarrasque makes one Bite attack and three other attacks, using Claw or Tail in any combination. It can replace two attacks with a use of Hurl Debris.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 19}, reach 15 ft. {@h}36 ({@damage 4d12 + 10}) Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 20}). Until the grapple ends, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can't teleport.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 19}, reach 15 ft. {@h}28 ({@damage 4d8 + 10}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 19}, reach 30 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 3d8 + 10}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Hurl Debris
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 19}, range 60/240 ft. {@h}37 ({@damage 6d8 + 10}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Thunderous Bellow {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 27}, each creature and each object that isn't being worn or carried in a 150-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 78 ({@damage 12d12}) Thunder damage, and the target has the {@condition Deafened|XPHB} and {@condition Frightened|XPHB} conditions until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Disintegration Breath (1/Day)
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 27}, each creature in a 240-foot-long, 20-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 75 ({@damage 10d6 + 40}) Force damage. If this damage reduces a creature to 0 hit points, its body disintegrates into fine gray dust, along with everything it is wearing and carrying, except magic items. A creature reduced to dust in this way can be restored to life only by a {@spell True Resurrection|XPHB} or a {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 27}, one Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the tarrasque (it can have up to six creatures swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The target is swallowed, and the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition ends. A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions and can't teleport, it has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the tarrasque, and it takes 56 ({@damage 16d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the tarrasque's turns.

If the tarrasque takes 60 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the tarrasque must succeed on a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the tarrasque and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the tarrasque dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 20 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Onslaught
entries: The tarrasque moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Claw or Tail attack.

legendary.name: World-Shaking Movement
entries: The tarrasque moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}. At the end of this movement, the tarrasque creates an instantaneous shock wave in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from itself. Creatures in that area lose {@status Concentration|XPHB} and, if Medium or smaller, have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. The tarrasque can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The thri-kreen casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The thri-kreen makes two attacks, using Gythka or Psionic Thrust in any combination.

action.name: Gythka
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Psionic Thrust
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, reach 10 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Psychic damage.

bonus.name: Psi-Leap
entries: The thri-kreen jumps up to 30 feet by spending 5 feet of movement.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The thri-kreen casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Desert Strider
entries: The thri-kreen ignores {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} caused by shifting or uneven terrain in a desert or sandy environment.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The thri-kreen makes two attacks, using Gythka or Chatkcha in any combination.

action.name: Gythka
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Slashing damage, plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Poison damage, plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

action.name: Chatkcha
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage, plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Piercing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Leap
entries: The thri-kreen jumps up to 15 feet by spending 5 feet of movement.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The treant casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

trait.name: Aura of Blight
entries: At the end of each of the treant's turns, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the treant takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The treant makes two Rotting Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast {@spell Contagion|XPHB} or {@spell Darkness|XPHB}.

action.name: Rotting Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 5 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d6 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Hail of Rotting Bark
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 12}, range 180 ft. {@h}29 ({@damage 4d10 + 7}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Animate Dead Trees (1/Day)
entries: The treant magically animates up to two dead trees it can see within 60 feet of itself. Each dead tree uses the Treant stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1, it can't speak, it lacks this action, and has the Undead creature type. The dead tree takes its turn immediately after the treant on the same {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, and it obeys the treant. A dead tree remains animate for 1 day or until it dies, the treant dies, or it is more than 120 feet from the treant.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The treant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

trait.name: Aura of Life Bloom
entries: At the end of each of the treant's turns, one living creature of the treant's choice (other than itself) in a 10- foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the treant regains 7 ({@dice 2d6}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. If the creature is a Plant, its flowers blossom, seed pod opens, or leaf bud blooms.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The treant makes two Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast {@spell Conjure Animals|XPHB}, {@spell Cure Wounds|XPHB}, {@spell Entangle|XPHB}, or {@spell Lesser Restoration|XPHB}.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the start of the treant's next turn.

action.name: Hail of Bark
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 180 ft. {@h}28 ({@dice 4d10 + 6}) Piercing, and the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the start of the treant's next turn.

action.name: Animate Trees (1/Day)
entries: The treant magically animates up to two trees it can see within 60 feet of itself. Each tree uses the Treant stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1, it can't speak, and it lacks this action. The tree takes its turn immediately after the treant on the same {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, and it obeys the treant. A tree remains animate for 1 day or until it dies, the treant dies, or it is more than 120 feet from the treant. The tree then takes root if possible.

trait.name: Stench
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, any creature (other than a troglodyte) that starts its turn in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the troglodyte. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Stench of all troglodytes for 1 hour.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the troglodyte has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troglodyte makes two attacks, using Bone Club or Rend in any combination.

action.name: Bone Club
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage.

trait.name: Alpha's Presence
entries: Allies of the troglodyte's choice (excluding itself) in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB} or has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} or {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Stench
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, any creature (other than a troglodyte) that starts its turn in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the troglodyte. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Stench of all troglodytes for 1 hour.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the troglodyte has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troglodyte makes two attacks, using Bone Club or Rend in any combination.

action.name: Bone Club
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 10 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Battle Cry {@recharge}
entries: Up to three allies of the troglodyte that can see or hear it gain 10 ({@dice 1d10 + 5}) {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} and can make one melee attack.

legendary.name: Lunge
entries: The troglodyte moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendary.name: Overwhelming Blow
entries: The troglodyte makes one Bone Club attack with advantage on the attack roll. The troglodyte can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The troglodyte casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Stench
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, any creature (other than a troglodyte) that starts its turn in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the troglodyte. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Stench of all troglodytes for 1 hour.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the troglodyte has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Noxious Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 120 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of the troglodyte's next turn.

trait.name: Stench
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 12}, any creature (other than a troglodyte) that starts its turn in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the troglodyte. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Stench of all troglodytes for 1 hour.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the troglodyte has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troglodyte makes two Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Slashing damage, plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Slashing damage if the attack roll had {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Stealthy
entries: The troglodyte takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

trait.name: Loathsome Limbs (4/Day)
entries: If the troll ends any turn {@status Bloodied|XPHB} and took 20+ Slashing damage during that turn, one of the troll's limbs is severed, falls into the troll's space, and becomes a Troll Limb. The limb acts immediately after the troll's turn. The troll has 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level for each missing limb, and it grows replacement limbs the next time it regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, or is in direct sunlight, this trait doesn't function on the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the cave troll has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes three Rend attacks. If two or more attacks hit the same creature in the same turn, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of the troll's next turn.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Charge
entries: The troll moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} straight toward an enemy it can see.

trait.name: Loathsome Limbs (4/Day)
entries: If the troll ends any turn {@status Bloodied|XPHB} and took 30+ Slashing damage during that turn, one of the troll's limbs is severed, falls into the troll's space, and becomes a Troll Limb. The limb acts immediately after the troll's turn. The troll has 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level for each missing limb, and it grows replacement limbs the next time it regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 20 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function on the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Fling.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 15 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}) from one of two claws, and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

action.name: Fling
entries: The troll throws a Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by it to a space it can see within 30 feet of itself that isn't in the air. {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. {@actSaveFail} 20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

bonus.name: Charge
entries: The troll moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} straight toward an enemy it can see.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function on the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes two Spear attacks.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage, or 9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Piercing damage if the troll moved 30+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage.

bonus.name: Charge
entries: The troll moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} straight toward an enemy it can see.

trait.name: Loathsome Limbs (4/Day)
entries: If the troll ends any turn {@status Bloodied|XPHB} and took 30+ Slashing damage during that turn, one of the troll's limbs is severed, falls into the troll's space, and becomes a Troll Limb. The limb acts immediately after the troll's turn. The troll has 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level for each missing limb, and it grows replacement limbs the next time it regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 20 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function on the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes two attacks, using Tree Club or Tree Lob in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Ground Pound.

action.name: Tree Club
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 15 ft. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d8 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Tree Lob
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 11}, range 60/240 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d6 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Ground Pound {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 19}, each creature standing on the ground in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} originating from the giant. {@actSaveFail} 25 ({@damage 4d8 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The troll regains 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function on the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The troll makes three attacks, using Greatsword or Javelin in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Cleaving Swing, if available.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Javelin
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Piercing damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the troll's next turn.

action.name: Cleaving Swing {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube} originating from the troll. {@actSaveFail} 19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Slashing damage, and if the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Charge
entries: The troll moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} straight toward an enemy it can see.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The umber hulk can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 15-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The umber hulk makes three Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 15 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 3d8 + 7}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Confusing Gaze {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} The target can't take Reactions until the start of the umber hulk's next turn, and the target rolls {@dice 1d8} to determine what it does on its next turn:

items.entry: The target takes no action or {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} and uses all its movement to move in a random direction.

entries: The target makes a melee attack against a random creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.

bonus.name: Ground-Shaking Movement {@recharge 5}
entries: The umber hulk burrows up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}. At the end of this movement, the umber hulk creates an instantaneous shock wave in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from itself. Creatures in that area are subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 19}. {@actSaveFail} A creature loses {@status Concentration|XPHB} and, if Large or smaller, have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The umber hulk can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The umber hulk makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Gore.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 15 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the umber hulk moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Confusing Gaze {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} The target can't take Reactions until the start of the umber hulk's next turn, and the target rolls {@dice 1d8} to determine what it does on its next turn:

items.entry: The target takes no action or {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} and uses all its movement to move in a random direction.

entries: The target makes a melee attack against a random creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.

bonus.name: Trample
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 17}, one creature within 5 feet that has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The umber hulk can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The umber hulk makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Stink Spray, if available.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Stink Spray {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Acid damage and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the umber hulk's next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Confusing Gaze {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} The target can't take Reactions until the start of the umber hulk's next turn, and the target rolls {@dice 1d8} to determine what it does on its next turn:

items.entry: The target takes no action or {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} and uses all its movement to move in a random direction.

entries: The target makes a melee attack against a random creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The unicorn casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

spellcasting.name: Enfeeble (3/Day)
headerEntries: The unicorn casts {@spell Ray of Enfeeblement|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the unicorn fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The unicorn has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The unicorn makes one Hooves attack and one Necrotic Horn attack.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Necrotic Horn
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the unicorn's next turn.

legendary.name: Charging Horn
entries: The unicorn moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks, and it makes one Necrotic Horn attack.

legendary.name: Dreadful Presence
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the unicorn. {@actSaveFail} The creature has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the unicorn's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this unicorn's Dreadful Presence for 24 hours.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The vampire casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 19}):

spellcasting.name: Charm {@recharge 5}
headerEntries: The vampire casts {@spell Charm Person|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 19}), and the duration is 24 hours. The Charmed target is a willing recipient of the vampire's Bite, the damage of which doesn't end the spell. When the spell ends, the target is unaware it was Charmed by the vampire.

trait.name: Aura of Despair
entries: Creatures in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the vampire have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on saving throws and their Speeds halved while in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. Creatures immune to the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition are unaffected by the aura. The vampire can designate creatures to be unaffected by the aura.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the vampire fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Misty Escape
entries: If the vampire drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} outside its resting place, the vampire uses Shape-Shift to become mist (no action required). If it can't use Shape-Shift, it is destroyed.

While it has 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in mist form, it can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it regains any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and it regains 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} after spending 1 hour there.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Vampire Weakness
entries: The vampire has these weaknesses:

items.name: Forbiddance
entries: The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.

items.name: Running Water
entries: The vampire takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.

items.name: Stake to the Heart
entries: If a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while the vampire has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition in its resting place, the vampire has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until the weapon is removed.

items.name: Sunlight
entries: The vampire takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)
entries: The vampire makes three attacks, using Greatsword, Grave Strike, or Necrotic Bolt in any combination. It then also uses Bite.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Necrotic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) from one of two hands.

action.name: Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only)
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 19}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 1d4 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount. A Humanoid reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by this damage and then buried rises the following sunset as a Vampire Spawn under the vampire's control.

action.name: Necrotic Bolt
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 11}, range 120 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Necrotic damage and the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Summon Fiends and Undead (1/Day)
entries: {@dice 1d6} Demons, Devils, or Undead whose combined average hit points don't exceed 150 appear in unoccupied spaces within 30 feet of the vampire. The summoned creatures are allies to the vampire. In combat, the creatures share the vampire's {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, but they take their turn immediately after the vampire.

bonus.name: Dreadful Smite
entries: A creature hit by the vampire's melee attack takes an extra 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Necrotic damage and is subjected to the following effect: {@actSave wis} {@dc 19}. The target and has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the vampire's next turn.
While {@condition Frightened|XPHB} in this way, the creature also has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: If the vampire isn't in sunlight or running water, it shape-shifts into a Tiny bat ({@variantrule Speed|XPHB} 5 ft., {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} 30 ft.) or a Medium cloud of mist ({@variantrule Speed|XPHB} 5 ft., {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} 20 ft. [hover]), or it returns to its vampire form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it.
While in bat form, the vampire can't speak. Its game statistics, other than its size and {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, are unchanged.

While in mist form, the vampire can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight.

legendary.name: Dark Bolt
entries: The vampire makes one Necrotic Bolt attack.

legendary.name: Deathless Strike
entries: The vampire moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Grave Strike attack.

legendary.name: Dreadful Magic
entries: The vampire uses Spellcasting to cast {@spell Bane|XPHB}, {@spell Banishment|XPHB}, {@spell Command|XPHB} (level 4 version), {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB}, or {@spell Fear|XPHB}.
The vampire can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the vampire is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the vampire instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack

action.name: Sickle

action.name: Advantage
entries: If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}) from one of two claws.

The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The vampire takes the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

entries: {@actTrigger} The vampire is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse} The vampire adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

trait.name: Invisible in Water
entries: The water weird has the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition while fully immersed in water.

trait.name: Water Bound
entries: The water weird dies if it leaves the water to which it is bound or if that water is destroyed.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The water weird makes two Surge attacks.

action.name: Surge
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 15 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Cold damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}), and it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the grapple ends.

trait.name: Marshal Allies
entries: Allies of the wight's choice (excluding itself) in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and saving throws. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the wight has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ability checks and attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The wight makes two attacks, using Necrotic Sword or Necrotic Bow in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Commander's Strike, Life Drain, or Maneuver Allies, if available.

action.name: Necrotic Sword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Necrotic Bow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 150/600 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Life Drain
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, one creature within 5 feet. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Necrotic damage, and the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken. A Humanoid slain by this attack rises 24 hours later as a Zombie under the wight's control, unless the Humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The wight can have no more than twelve zombies under its control at a time.

action.name: Commander's Strike
entries: One ally that can see or hear the wight can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one attack with a weapon or an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} at a target the wight chooses, adding 9 ({@dice 2d8}) to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

action.name: Maneuver Allies {@recharge 5}
entries: Each ally within 30 feet of the wight can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

trait.name: Heroic Warrior (1/Day)
entries: The wight can reroll any die immediately after rolling it, and it must use the new roll.

trait.name: Improved Critical
entries: The wight's attack rolls and Unarmed Strikes can score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} on a roll of 19 or 20 on the {@dice d20}.
